headline: A Giant Cable Exposes Ireland’s AI Ambitions and Security Risks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- On the southwest coast of County Cork, where the lush green landscape gives way to the paler green of the Atlantic Ocean, Ireland is about to make its mark in the tech world again. A subsea cable is due to make landfall here, a high-capacity fiber-optic link designed to handle artificial intelligence loads for Amazon Web Services customers across Europe.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX IPO Left Mirae With No Shares on MisunderstandingSupreme Court Backs Birthright Citizenship in Blo

headline: Amazon (AMZN) Launches $1 Billion AI Engineering Unit Inside Customer Organizations
summary: Amazon Web Services is creating a new Forward Deployed Engineering division funded with US$1b. The unit will embed specialist AI engineers directly inside customer organizations. The aim is to speed up enterprise adoption of AI and agentic AI systems through hands-on co-development. For investors following Amazon.com, Inc. (NasdaqGS:AMZN), this move highlights how important AI services are within the wider AWS business. Instead of only offering tools and guidance from the outside, AWS plans...
